name: Hiraki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hiraki Co.,Ltd. engages in the shoes and footwear planning and development, mail-order, store, and wholesale clothing businesses in Japan. The company provides various shoes, including sneakers, casual and business shoes, boots, pumps, sandals, beach home sandals, rain shoes and boots, school shoes, and work shoes for women and men; kids and junior's shoes; and baby shoes. It also offers a range of wear products comprising tops, bottoms, room wear, inners, leg wear, sportswear/swimsuits, school wear, bra and shorts sets, underwear, sanitary shorts, and bodysuit girdles for women, kids and juniors, and men. In addition, the company provides interior goods, beddings, covers, rugs, carpets, curtains, cushions, slippers, and others; and fashion accessories, bath and toilet products, cleaning/laundry supplies, towels, kitchen utensils, storage supplies, stationery and household goods, bags, beauty and hygiene products, and others, as well as umbrellas, parasols, and raincoats. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.
